---
title: "Bibliography"
subtitle: "One IT Research Working Group — Reference List"
author: "Compiled by Tim Dennis, UCLA Library Data Science Center"
date: "March 2026"
bibliography: bibliography.ris
nocite: '@*'
csl: apa.csl
---

Sources organized by category. The formatted reference list appears below; the source RIS file is available for import into Zotero or other reference managers via the [Resources](resources.qmd) page.

## Source Categories

| # | Category |
|---|----------|
| 1 | UCLA Primary Documents |
| 2 | Federal Policy and Funder Mandates |
| 3 | Federal Funding Crisis (2025–2026) |
| 4 | AI and Research Computing Infrastructure |
| 5 | Library Technical Infrastructure and Research Software |
| 6 | IT Consolidation and Higher Education IT |
| 7 | UCLA Faculty and Senate Responses to OneIT (2025) |
| 8 | OneIT Administration Documents |

---

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
